home.title: Discover Your Perfect Style

virtualTryOn.title: AI Virtual Try-On

smartWardrobe.title: Smart Wardrobe
smartWardrobe.description: Organize your clothes digitally. Upload, categorize, and manage your entire wardrobe in one place.

outfitRecommendations.title: Outfit Recommendations
outfitRecommendations.description: Get AI-powered outfit suggestions based on your wardrobe and personal style preferences.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the difference between Fashion Rec and the many similar services already available in the market?
faq.a1: 1. Fashion Rec is a service designed for individual users. 2. It features a smart wardrobe for convenient personal clothing management. 3. It is affordable, and free users can also enjoy full functionality.
faq.q2: How do I use the AI virtual try-on?
faq.a2: Upload your photo and the garments you want to try. Our AI will generate the try-on results automatically. You can start in the Studio page.
faq.q3: If I don't plan to pay, is this website useless to me?
faq.a3: Absolutely not. We believe people will always pay for quality service. Even if you subscribe to the free plan, you can still enjoy all core features.
faq.q4: What is the difference between Free and Premium?
faq.a4: The Free plan offers 2 try-on per day with core features and history saving. Premium includes more try-ons and advanced features.
faq.a5: We take privacy and security seriously. All uploaded photos and data are stored with encryption and never shared with third parties.
faq.a6: JPG, PNG, WEBP and other common formats are supported. Clear portrait photos provide the best results.
faq.q7: How do I manage my wardrobe?
faq.a7: After signing in, go to "My Wardrobe" to add, edit, or delete items.

errors.networkError: Cannot reach backend service. Please ensure the backend is running.
errors.timeout: Request timed out; backend may still be initializing. Wait a moment and refresh.
errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
errors.backendInitializing: Backend is initializing; please wait a moment and refresh.

chat.title: AI Chat Studio
chat.chatHistoryHint: Stored in this browser. Open an entry to view it; sending a new message starts a fresh server thread (not continued from the old one).
chat.chatHistoryEmpty: No saved chats yet — they appear here as you message.
chat.chatHistoryServerEmpty: No cloud sessions yet. After you send a message while logged in, threads appear here and continue the same ChatKit/Grok context.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about outfits, try-on, or your wardrobe…

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.agentMaxTurns: The agent hit its max turn limit (common after many tool calls). Start a new chat or give a more direct instruction; you can raise CHATKIT_MAX_TURNS in the backend .env (default 100, max 200).
errors.llmUnreachable: Could not reach the AI service. If you must use a proxy: set CHATKIT_XAI_LOCAL_PROXY_PORT=10808 (v2rayN mixed) or CHATKIT_XAI_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:10808 in the backend .env — Windows often does not pass “system proxy” to uvicorn. With global proxy rules, bypass 127.0.0.1 / localhost for local APIs.

contextGarmentsRail.title: This chat context

chat.hint: Chat here — no need to open Studio in another place. Model, background, and wardrobe picks from the app are sent with each message; if no model is selected, a default model photo is used for try-on. Use + for local upload or wardrobe.
chat.loadFailedNetwork: Network error while loading chat. Try again.
chat.loadFailedTimeout: Chat took too long to load. Refresh the page.

outfitContext.title: Optional context
outfitContext.description: If you configured model, background, or base items in Studio, each message includes that state for tools to use. Whether outfits are generated is still decided by the chat model from your conversation.
outfitContext.openFullStudio: Manage model, background & wardrobe in Studio

attachPanel.title: Add images
attachPanel.description: Tap Add images in the composer bar to open this panel: upload local files above, or pick wardrobe items below and tap Add to composer.
attachPanel.exampleBackgroundsHint: Describe a scene in your message (e.g. snow, boat, maple, sofa); we auto-pick a matching sample as the try-on background (Qwen image 3). You can also tap a thumbnail for a default when no keyword matches (same as Studio background).
attachPanel.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 15MB or smaller.
attachPanel.localAttachFailed: Could not attach images. Please try again.
